Who We Are

About Kalpavriksham Trust

Kalpavriksham Trust is a charitable organisation based in South Chennai, established with the mission of alleviating pain and suffering caused by cancer. We serve underprivileged communities through free medical camps, cancer awareness programmes, screening, and holistic support.

We are registered under 12AB/10AD & 80G of the Income Tax Act, listed on NGO Darpan (Niti Aayog), and hold CSR-1 certification. We are proud members of the Women's Indian Association, Women's Voluntary Service of Tamil Nadu, and Cancer Care India.

Read our full story →

Dr. M. Banupriya
MBBS, MD(RT), FIAMS, CCEPC(Palliative Care), Ph.D
Director, Kalpavriksham Trust
🏆 UN International Peace Council Award

A renowned oncologist practising in Chennai for over eight years. Felicitated by the Gandhi Nagar Ladies Club and featured across leading newspapers for her awareness initiatives.

Read Full Profile →
Our Founder & Purpose

Driven by compassion, guided by medicine.

Dr. Banupriya founded Kalpavriksham Trust with a single belief — that no one should suffer from cancer for lack of awareness or resources. Her work spans free screening camps in rural villages, palliative care for terminal patients, and awareness talks at colleges and corporates across Tamil Nadu.

The trust was recognised at the Pink Pulse 2025 organised by the Madras School of Social Work, and Dr. Banupriya was honoured by the United Nations International Peace Council for her contributions to women's health.

🌟 Our Vision

To uplift society, alleviate pain and suffering from cancer, making a positive difference in the community we live in.

🎯 Our Mission

Conduct free camps, provide essential medicines, create awareness, support cancer treatment and palliative care, and provide financial aid to underprivileged individuals.

Every contribution — big or small — helps us reach more lives. Choose how you'd like to join the mission.

Be a Donor

Your generosity transforms lives. By donating, you help underprivileged patients access cancer screening, treatment support, medicines, and financial aid.

Mentor patients, conduct awareness programmes, support events, and contribute your skills to drive meaningful social change across Tamil Nadu.

Testimonials

Durgadevi Nagarajan

"I did pap smear and breast examination today at Natchatra Old Age Home under the guidance of Dr. Banupriya under Kalpavriksham Trust. Hygienic and experienced service provided."

Read More →
Thenmozhi R

"A breast and cervical cancer camp was conducted at Kalpavriksham and Privaram Hospital. They planned to conduct breast self-examination, pap tests and mammogram tests — excellent initiative."

Read More →
Patient Review

"Kalpavriksham Trust is the most excellent place to get treated — you will be in the right hands. Dr. Banupriya has a very good approach to treating cancer and she is an excellent doctor who supports all treatment and ensures every patient gets treated right. What was really amazing to me was that the waiting time was short even though the centre was always full of patients!"
